query:
SELECT a.task_id     AS "task_id!: Uuid",
               a.uploader_id,
               b.project_id  AS "project_id!: Uuid"
        FROM   task_attachments a
        JOIN   tasks t ON t.id = a.task_id
        JOIN   boards b ON b.id = t.board_id
        WHERE  a.id = $1 AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
